items.title: What happened when Rebel Wilson gave evidence in court?
items.dek: The Hollywood star is accused by fellow Australian actress Charlotte MacInnes of making defamatory statements.
items.body: The Hollywood star is accused by fellow Australian actress Charlotte MacInnes of making defamatory statements.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Austrian goes on trial accused of plotting attack on Taylor Swift concert
items.dek: Prosecutors say the man, 21-year-old Beran A, received training from members of jihadist group Islamic State on how to handle explosives.
items.body: Prosecutors say the man, 21-year-old Beran A, received training from members of jihadist group Islamic State on how to handle explosives.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Russian superyacht sails through Strait of Hormuz despite blockade
items.dek: The 141m-long vessel, linked to a close ally of Russian President Vladimir Putin, cleared the waterway despite an ongoing blockade.
items.body: The 141m-long vessel, linked to a close ally of Russian President Vladimir Putin, cleared the waterway despite an ongoing blockade.
items.author: IriLine Desk
